properties.description: Identifies when multiple users mailboxes are configured to forward to the same destination.
properties.body:
let OfficeActivity = OfficeActivity365_CL
| extend RawJson = parse_json(RawEventData_s)
| extend 
    OfficeWorkload = OfficeWorkload_s,
    Operation = Operation_s,
    UserId = coalesce(UserId_s, tostring(UserId_g)),
    ClientIP = ClientIP_s,
    ResultStatus = ResultStatus_s,
    RecordType = tostring(RecordType_d),
    OfficeObjectId = coalesce(ObjectId_s, tostring(ObjectId_g)),
    UserType = toint(RawJson.UserType),
    Parameters = tostring(RawJson.Parameters),
    MailboxOwnerUPN = tostring(RawJson.MailboxOwnerUPN),
    Client_IPAddress = tostring(RawJson.ClientIPAddress),
    ClientInfoString = tostring(RawJson.ClientInfoString),
    Logon_Type = tostring(RawJson.LogonType),
    OriginatingServer = tostring(RawJson.OriginatingServer),
    SourceFileName = coalesce(SourceFileName_s, tostring(RawJson.SourceFileName)),
    SourceFileExtension = coalesce(SourceFileExtension_s, tostring(RawJson.SourceFileExtension)),
    SourceRelativeUrl = coalesce(SourceRelativeUrl_s, tostring(RawJson.SourceRelativeUrl)),
    SiteUrl = coalesce(SiteUrl_s, tostring(RawJson.SiteUrl)),
    EventSource = coalesce(EventSource_s, tostring(RawJson.EventSource)),
    TeamName = tostring(RawJson.TeamName),
    Members = tostring(RawJson.Members),
    UserAgent = tostring(RawJson.UserAgent)
| project-away RawJson;
let queryfrequency = 1d;
let queryperiod = 7d;
OfficeActivity
| where TimeGenerated > ago(queryperiod)
| where OfficeWorkload =~ "Exchange"
| where Parameters has_any ("ForwardTo", "RedirectTo", "ForwardingSmtpAddress")
| mv-apply DynamicParameters = todynamic(Parameters) on (summarize ParsedParameters = make_bag(bag_pack(tostring(DynamicParameters.Name), DynamicParameters.Value)))
| evaluate bag_unpack(ParsedParameters, columnsConflict='replace_source')
| extend DestinationMailAddress = tolower(case(
    isnotempty(column_ifexists("ForwardTo", "")), column_ifexists("ForwardTo", ""),
    isnotempty(column_ifexists("RedirectTo", "")), column_ifexists("RedirectTo", ""),
    isnotempty(column_ifexists("ForwardingSmtpAddress", "")), trim_start(@"smtp:", column_ifexists("ForwardingSmtpAddress", "")),
    ""))
| where isnotempty(DestinationMailAddress)
| mv-expand split(DestinationMailAddress, ";")
| summarize StartTime = min(TimeGenerated), EndTime = max(TimeGenerated), DistinctUserCount = dcount(UserId), Users = make_set(UserId, 250), EventCount = count() by tostring(DestinationMailAddress), ClientIP
| where DistinctUserCount > 1 and EndTime > ago(queryfrequency)
properties.displayName: [M365] Multiple users email forwarded to same destination

properties.description: Identifies when exchange audit logging has been disabled - adversary attempt to evade detection.
properties.body:
let OfficeActivity = OfficeActivity365_CL
| extend RawJson = parse_json(RawEventData_s)
| extend 
    OfficeWorkload = OfficeWorkload_s,
    Operation = Operation_s,
    UserId = coalesce(UserId_s, tostring(UserId_g)),
    ClientIP = ClientIP_s,
    ResultStatus = ResultStatus_s,
    RecordType = tostring(RecordType_d),
    OfficeObjectId = coalesce(ObjectId_s, tostring(ObjectId_g)),
    UserType = toint(RawJson.UserType),
    Parameters = tostring(RawJson.Parameters),
    MailboxOwnerUPN = tostring(RawJson.MailboxOwnerUPN),
    Client_IPAddress = tostring(RawJson.ClientIPAddress),
    ClientInfoString = tostring(RawJson.ClientInfoString),
    Logon_Type = tostring(RawJson.LogonType),
    OriginatingServer = tostring(RawJson.OriginatingServer),
    SourceFileName = coalesce(SourceFileName_s, tostring(RawJson.SourceFileName)),
    SourceFileExtension = coalesce(SourceFileExtension_s, tostring(RawJson.SourceFileExtension)),
    SourceRelativeUrl = coalesce(SourceRelativeUrl_s, tostring(RawJson.SourceRelativeUrl)),
    SiteUrl = coalesce(SiteUrl_s, tostring(RawJson.SiteUrl)),
    EventSource = coalesce(EventSource_s, tostring(RawJson.EventSource)),
    TeamName = tostring(RawJson.TeamName),
    Members = tostring(RawJson.Members),
    UserAgent = tostring(RawJson.UserAgent)
| project-away RawJson;
OfficeActivity
| where OfficeWorkload =~ "Exchange"
| where UserType in (2, 3)
| where Operation =~ "Set-AdminAuditLogConfig"
| extend AdminAuditLogEnabledValue = tostring(parse_json(tostring(parse_json(tostring(array_slice(parse_json(Parameters),3,3)))[0])).Value)
| where AdminAuditLogEnabledValue =~ "False"
| summarize StartTimeUtc = min(TimeGenerated), EndTimeUtc = max(TimeGenerated), OperationCount = count() by Operation, UserType, UserId, ClientIP, ResultStatus, Parameters, AdminAuditLogEnabledValue

properties.description: Detects inbox rules that delete emails containing suspicious keywords (helpdesk, alert, phishing, etc.).
properties.body:
let OfficeActivity = OfficeActivity365_CL
| extend RawJson = parse_json(RawEventData_s)
| extend 
    OfficeWorkload = OfficeWorkload_s,
    Operation = Operation_s,
    UserId = coalesce(UserId_s, tostring(UserId_g)),
    ClientIP = ClientIP_s,
    ResultStatus = ResultStatus_s,
    RecordType = tostring(RecordType_d),
    OfficeObjectId = coalesce(ObjectId_s, tostring(ObjectId_g)),
    UserType = toint(RawJson.UserType),
    Parameters = tostring(RawJson.Parameters),
    MailboxOwnerUPN = tostring(RawJson.MailboxOwnerUPN),
    Client_IPAddress = tostring(RawJson.ClientIPAddress),
    ClientInfoString = tostring(RawJson.ClientInfoString),
    Logon_Type = tostring(RawJson.LogonType),
    OriginatingServer = tostring(RawJson.OriginatingServer),
    SourceFileName = coalesce(SourceFileName_s, tostring(RawJson.SourceFileName)),
    SourceFileExtension = coalesce(SourceFileExtension_s, tostring(RawJson.SourceFileExtension)),
    SourceRelativeUrl = coalesce(SourceRelativeUrl_s, tostring(RawJson.SourceRelativeUrl)),
    SiteUrl = coalesce(SiteUrl_s, tostring(RawJson.SiteUrl)),
    EventSource = coalesce(EventSource_s, tostring(RawJson.EventSource)),
    TeamName = tostring(RawJson.TeamName),
    Members = tostring(RawJson.Members),
    UserAgent = tostring(RawJson.UserAgent)
| project-away RawJson;
let Keywords = dynamic(["helpdesk", " alert", " suspicious", "fake", "malicious", "phishing", "spam", "do not click", "do not open", "hijacked", "Fatal"]);
OfficeActivity
| where OfficeWorkload =~ "Exchange"
| where Operation =~ "New-InboxRule" and (ResultStatus =~ "True" or ResultStatus =~ "Succeeded")
| where Parameters has "Deleted Items" or Parameters has "Junk Email" or Parameters has "DeleteMessage"
| extend Events=todynamic(Parameters)
| parse Events with * "SubjectContainsWords" SubjectContainsWords '}'*
| parse Events with * "BodyContainsWords" BodyContainsWords '}'*
| parse Events with * "SubjectOrBodyContainsWords" SubjectOrBodyContainsWords '}'*
| where SubjectContainsWords has_any (Keywords) or BodyContainsWords has_any (Keywords) or SubjectOrBodyContainsWords has_any (Keywords)
| extend Keyword = iff(isnotempty(SubjectContainsWords), SubjectContainsWords, (iff(isnotempty(BodyContainsWords),BodyContainsWords,SubjectOrBodyContainsWords)))
| project TimeGenerated, Operation, UserId, ClientIP, ResultStatus, Keyword, OfficeObjectId

properties.description: Identifies when Exchange Online transport rule configured to forward emails - potential attacker mailbox.
properties.body:
let OfficeActivity = OfficeActivity365_CL
| extend RawJson = parse_json(RawEventData_s)
| extend 
    OfficeWorkload = OfficeWorkload_s,
    Operation = Operation_s,
    UserId = coalesce(UserId_s, tostring(UserId_g)),
    ClientIP = ClientIP_s,
    ResultStatus = ResultStatus_s,
    RecordType = tostring(RecordType_d),
    OfficeObjectId = coalesce(ObjectId_s, tostring(ObjectId_g)),
    UserType = toint(RawJson.UserType),
    Parameters = tostring(RawJson.Parameters),
    MailboxOwnerUPN = tostring(RawJson.MailboxOwnerUPN),
    Client_IPAddress = tostring(RawJson.ClientIPAddress),
    ClientInfoString = tostring(RawJson.ClientInfoString),
    Logon_Type = tostring(RawJson.LogonType),
    OriginatingServer = tostring(RawJson.OriginatingServer),
    SourceFileName = coalesce(SourceFileName_s, tostring(RawJson.SourceFileName)),
    SourceFileExtension = coalesce(SourceFileExtension_s, tostring(RawJson.SourceFileExtension)),
    SourceRelativeUrl = coalesce(SourceRelativeUrl_s, tostring(RawJson.SourceRelativeUrl)),
    SiteUrl = coalesce(SiteUrl_s, tostring(RawJson.SiteUrl)),
    EventSource = coalesce(EventSource_s, tostring(RawJson.EventSource)),
    TeamName = tostring(RawJson.TeamName),
    Members = tostring(RawJson.Members),
    UserAgent = tostring(RawJson.UserAgent)
| project-away RawJson;
OfficeActivity
| where OfficeWorkload == "Exchange"
| where Operation in~ ("New-TransportRule", "Set-TransportRule")
| mv-apply DynamicParameters = todynamic(Parameters) on (summarize ParsedParameters = make_bag(pack(tostring(DynamicParameters.Name), DynamicParameters.Value)))
| mv-expand ExpandedParameters = todynamic(Parameters)
| where ExpandedParameters.Name in~ ("BlindCopyTo", "RedirectMessageTo") and isnotempty(ExpandedParameters.Value)
| extend RedirectTo = tostring(ExpandedParameters.Value)
| extend RuleName = case(Operation =~ "Set-TransportRule", OfficeObjectId, Operation =~ "New-TransportRule", tostring(ParsedParameters.Name), "Unknown")
| project TimeGenerated, RedirectTo, UserId, Operation, RuleName, ClientIP
properties.displayName: [M365] Mail redirect via ExO transport rule

properties.description: Identifies rare Office operations that can provide capabilities useful to attackers.
properties.body:
let OfficeActivity = OfficeActivity365_CL
| extend RawJson = parse_json(RawEventData_s)
| extend 
    OfficeWorkload = OfficeWorkload_s,
    Operation = Operation_s,
    UserId = coalesce(UserId_s, tostring(UserId_g)),
    ClientIP = ClientIP_s,
    ResultStatus = ResultStatus_s,
    RecordType = tostring(RecordType_d),
    OfficeObjectId = coalesce(ObjectId_s, tostring(ObjectId_g)),
    UserType = toint(RawJson.UserType),
    Parameters = tostring(RawJson.Parameters),
    MailboxOwnerUPN = tostring(RawJson.MailboxOwnerUPN),
    Client_IPAddress = tostring(RawJson.ClientIPAddress),
    ClientInfoString = tostring(RawJson.ClientInfoString),
    Logon_Type = tostring(RawJson.LogonType),
    OriginatingServer = tostring(RawJson.OriginatingServer),
    SourceFileName = coalesce(SourceFileName_s, tostring(RawJson.SourceFileName)),
    SourceFileExtension = coalesce(SourceFileExtension_s, tostring(RawJson.SourceFileExtension)),
    SourceRelativeUrl = coalesce(SourceRelativeUrl_s, tostring(RawJson.SourceRelativeUrl)),
    SiteUrl = coalesce(SiteUrl_s, tostring(RawJson.SiteUrl)),
    EventSource = coalesce(EventSource_s, tostring(RawJson.EventSource)),
    TeamName = tostring(RawJson.TeamName),
    Members = tostring(RawJson.Members),
    UserAgent = tostring(RawJson.UserAgent)
| project-away RawJson;
OfficeActivity
| where Operation in~ ("Add-MailboxPermission", "Add-MailboxFolderPermission", "Set-Mailbox", "New-ManagementRoleAssignment", "New-InboxRule", "Set-InboxRule", "Set-TransportRule")
| project TimeGenerated, Operation, UserId, ClientIP, OfficeWorkload, ResultStatus, OfficeObjectId, Parameters
properties.displayName: [M365] Rare and potentially high-risk Office operations

properties.description: Identifies tampering with auditlog, ATP Safelink, SafeAttachment, AntiPhish or DLP policy.
properties.body:
let OfficeActivity = OfficeActivity365_CL
| extend RawJson = parse_json(RawEventData_s)
| extend 
    OfficeWorkload = OfficeWorkload_s,
    Operation = Operation_s,
    UserId = coalesce(UserId_s, tostring(UserId_g)),
    ClientIP = ClientIP_s,
    ResultStatus = ResultStatus_s,
    RecordType = tostring(RecordType_d),
    OfficeObjectId = coalesce(ObjectId_s, tostring(ObjectId_g)),
    UserType = toint(RawJson.UserType),
    Parameters = tostring(RawJson.Parameters),
    MailboxOwnerUPN = tostring(RawJson.MailboxOwnerUPN),
    Client_IPAddress = tostring(RawJson.ClientIPAddress),
    ClientInfoString = tostring(RawJson.ClientInfoString),
    Logon_Type = tostring(RawJson.LogonType),
    OriginatingServer = tostring(RawJson.OriginatingServer),
    SourceFileName = coalesce(SourceFileName_s, tostring(RawJson.SourceFileName)),
    SourceFileExtension = coalesce(SourceFileExtension_s, tostring(RawJson.SourceFileExtension)),
    SourceRelativeUrl = coalesce(SourceRelativeUrl_s, tostring(RawJson.SourceRelativeUrl)),
    SiteUrl = coalesce(SiteUrl_s, tostring(RawJson.SiteUrl)),
    EventSource = coalesce(EventSource_s, tostring(RawJson.EventSource)),
    TeamName = tostring(RawJson.TeamName),
    Members = tostring(RawJson.Members),
    UserAgent = tostring(RawJson.UserAgent)
| project-away RawJson;
let opList = OfficeActivity
| summarize by Operation
| where Operation has_any ("Remove", "Disable")
| where Operation contains "AntiPhish" or Operation contains "SafeAttachment" or Operation contains "SafeLinks" or Operation contains "Dlp" or Operation contains "Audit"
| summarize make_set(Operation, 500);
OfficeActivity
| where RecordType =~ "1"
| where UserType in (2, 3)
| where Operation in~ (opList)
| summarize StartTimeUtc = min(TimeGenerated), EndTimeUtc = max(TimeGenerated), OperationCount = count() by Operation, UserType, UserId, ClientIP, ResultStatus, Parameters

properties.description: Flags when multiple Teams are deleted within the detection period.
properties.body:
let OfficeActivity = OfficeActivity365_CL
| extend RawJson = parse_json(RawEventData_s)
| extend 
    OfficeWorkload = OfficeWorkload_s,
    Operation = Operation_s,
    UserId = coalesce(UserId_s, tostring(UserId_g)),
    ClientIP = ClientIP_s,
    ResultStatus = ResultStatus_s,
    RecordType = tostring(RecordType_d),
    OfficeObjectId = coalesce(ObjectId_s, tostring(ObjectId_g)),
    UserType = toint(RawJson.UserType),
    Parameters = tostring(RawJson.Parameters),
    MailboxOwnerUPN = tostring(RawJson.MailboxOwnerUPN),
    Client_IPAddress = tostring(RawJson.ClientIPAddress),
    ClientInfoString = tostring(RawJson.ClientInfoString),
    Logon_Type = tostring(RawJson.LogonType),
    OriginatingServer = tostring(RawJson.OriginatingServer),
    SourceFileName = coalesce(SourceFileName_s, tostring(RawJson.SourceFileName)),
    SourceFileExtension = coalesce(SourceFileExtension_s, tostring(RawJson.SourceFileExtension)),
    SourceRelativeUrl = coalesce(SourceRelativeUrl_s, tostring(RawJson.SourceRelativeUrl)),
    SiteUrl = coalesce(SiteUrl_s, tostring(RawJson.SiteUrl)),
    EventSource = coalesce(EventSource_s, tostring(RawJson.EventSource)),
    TeamName = tostring(RawJson.TeamName),
    Members = tostring(RawJson.Members),
    UserAgent = tostring(RawJson.UserAgent)
| project-away RawJson;
let max_delete_count = 3;
OfficeActivity
| where OfficeWorkload =~ "MicrosoftTeams"
| where Operation =~ "TeamDeleted"
| summarize StartTime = min(TimeGenerated), EndTime = max(TimeGenerated), DeletedTeams = make_set(TeamName, 1000) by UserId
| where array_length(DeletedTeams) > max_delete_count
properties.displayName: [M365] Multiple Teams deleted by a single user

properties.description: Flags external user accounts added to a Team and then removed within one hour.
properties.body:
let OfficeActivity = OfficeActivity365_CL
| extend RawJson = parse_json(RawEventData_s)
| extend 
    OfficeWorkload = OfficeWorkload_s,
    Operation = Operation_s,
    UserId = coalesce(UserId_s, tostring(UserId_g)),
    ClientIP = ClientIP_s,
    ResultStatus = ResultStatus_s,
    RecordType = tostring(RecordType_d),
    OfficeObjectId = coalesce(ObjectId_s, tostring(ObjectId_g)),
    UserType = toint(RawJson.UserType),
    Parameters = tostring(RawJson.Parameters),
    MailboxOwnerUPN = tostring(RawJson.MailboxOwnerUPN),
    Client_IPAddress = tostring(RawJson.ClientIPAddress),
    ClientInfoString = tostring(RawJson.ClientInfoString),
    Logon_Type = tostring(RawJson.LogonType),
    OriginatingServer = tostring(RawJson.OriginatingServer),
    SourceFileName = coalesce(SourceFileName_s, tostring(RawJson.SourceFileName)),
    SourceFileExtension = coalesce(SourceFileExtension_s, tostring(RawJson.SourceFileExtension)),
    SourceRelativeUrl = coalesce(SourceRelativeUrl_s, tostring(RawJson.SourceRelativeUrl)),
    SiteUrl = coalesce(SiteUrl_s, tostring(RawJson.SiteUrl)),
    EventSource = coalesce(EventSource_s, tostring(RawJson.EventSource)),
    TeamName = tostring(RawJson.TeamName),
    Members = tostring(RawJson.Members),
    UserAgent = tostring(RawJson.UserAgent)
| project-away RawJson;
let TeamsAddDel = (Op:string){
OfficeActivity
| where OfficeWorkload =~ "MicrosoftTeams"
| where Operation == Op
| where Members has ("#EXT#")
| extend ParsedMembers = todynamic(Members)
| mv-expand ParsedMembers
| extend UPN = tostring(ParsedMembers.UPN)
| where UPN has ("#EXT#")
| project TimeGenerated, Operation, UPN, UserId, TeamName, ClientIP
};
let TeamsAdd = TeamsAddDel("MemberAdded")
| project TimeAdded=TimeGenerated, MemberAdded = UPN, UserWhoAdded = UserId, TeamName, ClientIP;
let TeamsDel = TeamsAddDel("MemberRemoved")
| project TimeDeleted=TimeGenerated, MemberRemoved = UPN, UserWhoDeleted = UserId, TeamName;
TeamsAdd
| join kind=inner (TeamsDel) on $left.MemberAdded == $right.MemberRemoved
| where TimeDeleted > TimeAdded
| project TimeAdded, TimeDeleted, MemberAdded_Removed = MemberAdded, UserWhoAdded, UserWhoDeleted, TeamName, ClientIP
properties.displayName: [M365] External user added and removed in short timeframe

properties.description: Identifies SharePoint File Transfers above threshold (5000 files in 15min).
properties.body:
let OfficeActivity = OfficeActivity365_CL
| extend RawJson = parse_json(RawEventData_s)
| extend 
    OfficeWorkload = OfficeWorkload_s,
    Operation = Operation_s,
    UserId = coalesce(UserId_s, tostring(UserId_g)),
    ClientIP = ClientIP_s,
    ResultStatus = ResultStatus_s,
    RecordType = tostring(RecordType_d),
    OfficeObjectId = coalesce(ObjectId_s, tostring(ObjectId_g)),
    UserType = toint(RawJson.UserType),
    Parameters = tostring(RawJson.Parameters),
    MailboxOwnerUPN = tostring(RawJson.MailboxOwnerUPN),
    Client_IPAddress = tostring(RawJson.ClientIPAddress),
    ClientInfoString = tostring(RawJson.ClientInfoString),
    Logon_Type = tostring(RawJson.LogonType),
    OriginatingServer = tostring(RawJson.OriginatingServer),
    SourceFileName = coalesce(SourceFileName_s, tostring(RawJson.SourceFileName)),
    SourceFileExtension = coalesce(SourceFileExtension_s, tostring(RawJson.SourceFileExtension)),
    SourceRelativeUrl = coalesce(SourceRelativeUrl_s, tostring(RawJson.SourceRelativeUrl)),
    SiteUrl = coalesce(SiteUrl_s, tostring(RawJson.SiteUrl)),
    EventSource = coalesce(EventSource_s, tostring(RawJson.EventSource)),
    TeamName = tostring(RawJson.TeamName),
    Members = tostring(RawJson.Members),
    UserAgent = tostring(RawJson.UserAgent)
| project-away RawJson;
let threshold = 5000;
OfficeActivity
| where EventSource == "SharePoint" and OfficeWorkload has_any("SharePoint", "OneDrive") and Operation has_any ("FileDownloaded", "FileSyncDownloadedFull", "FileSyncUploadedFull", "FileUploaded")
| summarize count_distinct_Files=dcount(OfficeObjectId), fileslist=make_set(OfficeObjectId, 100) by UserId, ClientIP, bin(TimeGenerated, 15m)
| where count_distinct_Files >= threshold
properties.displayName: [M365] Office365 SharePoint File transfer above threshold

properties.description: Identifies when executable file types (exe, cmd, bat etc.) are uploaded to Office services.
properties.body:
let OfficeActivity = OfficeActivity365_CL
| extend RawJson = parse_json(RawEventData_s)
| extend 
    OfficeWorkload = OfficeWorkload_s,
    Operation = Operation_s,
    UserId = coalesce(UserId_s, tostring(UserId_g)),
    ClientIP = ClientIP_s,
    ResultStatus = ResultStatus_s,
    RecordType = tostring(RecordType_d),
    OfficeObjectId = coalesce(ObjectId_s, tostring(ObjectId_g)),
    UserType = toint(RawJson.UserType),
    Parameters = tostring(RawJson.Parameters),
    MailboxOwnerUPN = tostring(RawJson.MailboxOwnerUPN),
    Client_IPAddress = tostring(RawJson.ClientIPAddress),
    ClientInfoString = tostring(RawJson.ClientInfoString),
    Logon_Type = tostring(RawJson.LogonType),
    OriginatingServer = tostring(RawJson.OriginatingServer),
    SourceFileName = coalesce(SourceFileName_s, tostring(RawJson.SourceFileName)),
    SourceFileExtension = coalesce(SourceFileExtension_s, tostring(RawJson.SourceFileExtension)),
    SourceRelativeUrl = coalesce(SourceRelativeUrl_s, tostring(RawJson.SourceRelativeUrl)),
    SiteUrl = coalesce(SiteUrl_s, tostring(RawJson.SiteUrl)),
    EventSource = coalesce(EventSource_s, tostring(RawJson.EventSource)),
    TeamName = tostring(RawJson.TeamName),
    Members = tostring(RawJson.Members),
    UserAgent = tostring(RawJson.UserAgent)
| project-away RawJson;
let execExt = dynamic(['exe', 'inf', 'gzip', 'cmd', 'bat']);
OfficeActivity
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1d)
| where Operation =~ "FileUploaded"
| where SourceFileExtension has_any (execExt)
| project TimeGenerated, OfficeWorkload, Operation, UserId, ClientIP, UserAgent, SiteUrl, SourceRelativeUrl, SourceFileName

properties.description: Finds non-owner mailbox access by admin/delegate permissions.
properties.body:
let OfficeActivity = OfficeActivity365_CL
| extend RawJson = parse_json(RawEventData_s)
| extend 
    OfficeWorkload = OfficeWorkload_s,
    Operation = Operation_s,
    UserId = coalesce(UserId_s, tostring(UserId_g)),
    ClientIP = ClientIP_s,
    ResultStatus = ResultStatus_s,
    RecordType = tostring(RecordType_d),
    OfficeObjectId = coalesce(ObjectId_s, tostring(ObjectId_g)),
    UserType = toint(RawJson.UserType),
    Parameters = tostring(RawJson.Parameters),
    MailboxOwnerUPN = tostring(RawJson.MailboxOwnerUPN),
    Client_IPAddress = tostring(RawJson.ClientIPAddress),
    ClientInfoString = tostring(RawJson.ClientInfoString),
    Logon_Type = tostring(RawJson.LogonType),
    OriginatingServer = tostring(RawJson.OriginatingServer),
    SourceFileName = coalesce(SourceFileName_s, tostring(RawJson.SourceFileName)),
    SourceFileExtension = coalesce(SourceFileExtension_s, tostring(RawJson.SourceFileExtension)),
    SourceRelativeUrl = coalesce(SourceRelativeUrl_s, tostring(RawJson.SourceRelativeUrl)),
    SiteUrl = coalesce(SiteUrl_s, tostring(RawJson.SiteUrl)),
    EventSource = coalesce(EventSource_s, tostring(RawJson.EventSource)),
    TeamName = tostring(RawJson.TeamName),
    Members = tostring(RawJson.Members),
    UserAgent = tostring(RawJson.UserAgent)
| project-away RawJson;
OfficeActivity
| where OfficeWorkload == "Exchange"
| where Operation == "MailboxLogin" and Logon_Type != "Owner"
| summarize StartTime = min(TimeGenerated), EndTime = max(TimeGenerated), count() by Operation, UserId, MailboxOwnerUPN, Logon_Type, ClientIP

properties.description: Identifies anomalous increases in Exchange mail items accessed operations using time series analysis.
properties.body:
let OfficeActivity = OfficeActivity365_CL
| extend RawJson = parse_json(RawEventData_s)
| extend 
    OfficeWorkload = OfficeWorkload_s,
    Operation = Operation_s,
    UserId = coalesce(UserId_s, tostring(UserId_g)),
    ClientIP = ClientIP_s,
    ResultStatus = ResultStatus_s,
    RecordType = tostring(RecordType_d),
    OfficeObjectId = coalesce(ObjectId_s, tostring(ObjectId_g)),
    UserType = toint(RawJson.UserType),
    Parameters = tostring(RawJson.Parameters),
    MailboxOwnerUPN = tostring(RawJson.MailboxOwnerUPN),
    Client_IPAddress = tostring(RawJson.ClientIPAddress),
    ClientInfoString = tostring(RawJson.ClientInfoString),
    Logon_Type = tostring(RawJson.LogonType),
    OriginatingServer = tostring(RawJson.OriginatingServer),
    SourceFileName = coalesce(SourceFileName_s, tostring(RawJson.SourceFileName)),
    SourceFileExtension = coalesce(SourceFileExtension_s, tostring(RawJson.SourceFileExtension)),
    SourceRelativeUrl = coalesce(SourceRelativeUrl_s, tostring(RawJson.SourceRelativeUrl)),
    SiteUrl = coalesce(SiteUrl_s, tostring(RawJson.SiteUrl)),
    EventSource = coalesce(EventSource_s, tostring(RawJson.EventSource)),
    TeamName = tostring(RawJson.TeamName),
    Members = tostring(RawJson.Members),
    UserAgent = tostring(RawJson.UserAgent)
| project-away RawJson;
let starttime = 14d;
let endtime = 1d;
let timeframe = 1h;
let scorethreshold = 1.5;
let percentthreshold = 50;
let TimeSeriesData = OfficeActivity
| where TimeGenerated between (startofday(ago(starttime))..startofday(ago(endtime)))
| where OfficeWorkload =~ "Exchange" and Operation =~ "MailItemsAccessed" and ResultStatus =~ "Succeeded"
| project TimeGenerated, Operation, MailboxOwnerUPN
| make-series Total=count() on TimeGenerated from startofday(ago(starttime)) to startofday(ago(endtime)) step timeframe;
let TimeSeriesAlerts = TimeSeriesData
| extend (anomalies, score, baseline) = series_decompose_anomalies(Total, scorethreshold, -1, 'linefit')
| mv-expand Total to typeof(double), TimeGenerated to typeof(datetime), anomalies to typeof(double), score to typeof(double), baseline to typeof(long)
| where anomalies > 0
| project TimeGenerated, Total, baseline, anomalies, score;
TimeSeriesAlerts | where TimeGenerated > ago(2d)
| join kind=innerunique (
    OfficeActivity
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(2d)
    | where OfficeWorkload =~ "Exchange" and Operation =~ "MailItemsAccessed" and ResultStatus =~ "Succeeded"
    | summarize HourlyCount=count(), IPList = make_set(Client_IPAddress, 100), ClientInfoList= make_set(ClientInfoString, 100) by MailboxOwnerUPN, Logon_Type, UserId, TimeGenerated = bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
    | where HourlyCount > 25
) on TimeGenerated
| extend PercentofTotal = round(HourlyCount/Total, 2) * 100
| where PercentofTotal > percentthreshold
| project TimeGenerated, UserId, MailboxOwnerUPN, HourlyCount, Total, PercentofTotal, baseline, score, anomalies, IPList, ClientInfoList
